text: How did the woman get help?
zh: 这位女士是怎么获救的?

text: When a light passenger plane flew off course some time ago,
zh: 不久前,一架小型客机偏离了航线,

text: it crashed in the mountains and its pilot was killed.
zh: 在山中坠毁,飞行员不幸遇难。

text: The only passengers, a young woman and her two baby daughters, were unhurt.
zh: 机上仅有的乘客——一位年轻女士和她的两个女婴——都安然无恙。

text: It was the middle of winter.
Snow lay thick on the ground.
The woman knew that the nearest village was miles away.
zh: 这位女士知道,最近的村庄也在几英里之外。

text: When it grew dark, she turned a suitcase into a bed and put the children inside it,
zh: 天黑之后,她把一只手提箱改造成了一张床,把孩子们放了进去,

text: covering them with all the clothes she could find.
zh: 用她能找到的所有衣物盖在她们身上。

text: During the night, it got terribly cold.
zh: 夜里,天气变得异常寒冷。

text: The woman kept as near as she could to the children and even tried to get into the case herself, but it was too small.
zh: 她尽量靠近孩子们,甚至想自己也钻进箱子里,可是箱子太小了。

text: she heard planes passing overhead and wondered how she could send a signal.
zh: 她听到飞机从头顶飞过,心想该怎样发出信号。

text: Then she had an idea. She stamped out the letters 'SOS' in the snow.
zh: 这时她想到了一个办法:在雪地上踩出'SOS'的字样。

text: Fortunately, a pilot saw the signal and sent a message by radio to the nearest town.
zh: 幸运的是,一名飞行员看到了这个信号,用无线电向最近的城镇发送了消息。

text: It was not long before a helicopter arrived on the scene to rescue the survivors of the plane crash.
zh: 没过多久,一架直升机就抵达现场,救出了这场空难的幸存者。
